PowerShell($excel = New-Object -ComObject Excel.Application; $version = $excel.Version; $excel.Quit\(\); [System.Runtime.Interopservices.Marshal]::ReleaseComObject\($excel\) | Out-Null; Write-Output "Excel Version: $version")

PowerShell($excel = New-Object -ComObject Excel.Application; $ver = $excel.Version; $build = $excel.Build; $prod = $excel.ProductCode; Write-Output "Version: $ver"; Write-Output "Build: $build"; Write-Output "ProductCode: $prod"; $excel.Quit\(\); [System.Runtime.Interopservices.Marshal]::ReleaseComObject\($excel\) | Out-Null)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Office\\16.0\\Registration" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { \(Get-ItemProperty $_.PSPath -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).ProductName } | Where-Object { $_ -ne $null } | Sort-Object -Unique)

PowerShell($keys = Get-ChildItem "HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Office\\16.0\\Registration" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach \($k in $keys\) { $p = Get-ItemProperty $k.PSPath -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p.ProductName\) { Write-Output $p.ProductName } })
